data.body: Implemented: added a 'degradation-path tests run with NO agents extra' step to the clean-core-wheel job in optionality.yml. Installs only pytest+jsonschema+mcp (not the agents stack), asserts agents_extra_installed() is False, runs tests/interfaces/store/test_llm_optionality.py. Validated in a clean no-extras venv: 17 passed, 0 skipped (the 4 skipif(_AGENTS) degradation tests now execute). Commit 360a46f2.
